headline: TASK-051 is the live v5.0 frontier after 4.0.1.

current_state.operating_goal: Implement v5.0 Skillful Actor Runtime: turn skills, capabilities, resources, policies, and metrics into live actor assignment and council-reviewed workforce judgment while preserving the Human Recognition Interface as the operator surface.
current_state.next_value_slice: Start TASK-051 by implementing capability-fit and actor assignment evaluation on top of actor skill packets, so AOF can judge whether an assigned actor has sufficient skills and evidence before execution.

primary_frontier_task.title: Implement capability-fit and actor assignment evaluation

why_now.summary: TASK-051 is the best current frontier because it matches the live post-release goal surface and no stronger truth conflict is active.
reasons: The active release baseline is 4.0.1 and the runtime is now targeting v5.0.
The current operating goal and next value slice both point at skillful actor assignment: skills, capabilities, resources, policies, and review evidence should shape who does the work.

next_action.recommended_action: Start TASK-051: Implement capability-fit and actor assignment evaluation
next_action.rationale: This is the best open task aligned with the current operating goal and next release frontier.

operator_answers.what_is_happening_now: TASK-051 is the current frontier and the runtime is in implementation-ready.
operator_answers.why_this_state: TASK-051 is the best current frontier because it matches the live post-release goal surface and no stronger truth conflict is active.
operator_answers.what_is_blocked: No critical truth conflict is currently blocking the frontier.
operator_answers.what_should_happen_next: Start TASK-051: Implement capability-fit and actor assignment evaluation
